detail.description: Braxton Fulford flies out to right fielder Heliot Ramos.
Braxton Fulford grounds out, shortstop Christian Koss to first baseman Bryce Eldridge.
Braxton Fulford flies out to second baseman Anthony Seigler.
Braxton Fulford singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
Braxton Fulford pops out to shortstop Jared Triolo on the infield fly rule.
Braxton Fulford doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake Mangum. Tyler Freeman scores. Cole Carrigg scores.
Braxton Fulford doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.
Braxton Fulford singles on a fly ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Hunter Goodman scores. Edouard Julien to 3rd.
Braxton Fulford lines out to center fielder Drew Gilbert.
Braxton Fulford out on a sacrifice fly to first baseman Rafael Devers in foul territory. Kyle Karros scores.
Braxton Fulford grounds into a force out, third baseman Josh Jung to second baseman Justin Foscue. Sterlin Thompson out at 2nd. Braxton Fulford to 1st.
Braxton Fulford lines out to center fielder Michael Helman.
Braxton Fulford reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Max Muncy.
Braxton Fulford singles on a fly ball to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
Braxton Fulford singles on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
Braxton Fulford flies out to right fielder Kyle Tucker.
Braxton Fulford pops out to second baseman Miguel Rojas.
Braxton Fulford flies out to first baseman Tim Tawa in foul territory.
Braxton Fulford reaches on a fielder's choice out, pitcher Eduardo Rodriguez to catcher Gabriel Moreno. Ezequiel Tovar out at home. Jake McCarthy to 2nd.
Braxton Fulford flies out to right fielder Corbin Carroll.
Braxton Fulford homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.
Braxton Fulford pops out to first baseman Kazuma Okamoto in foul territory.
Braxton Fulford singles on a ground ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Jordan Beck scores.
Braxton Fulford pops out to second baseman Nico Hoerner.
Braxton Fulford flies out to left fielder Ian Happ.
Braxton Fulford grounds out, second baseman Kody Clemens to first baseman Royce Lewis.
